message:
fix(a11y): MissionControlDialog focus trap, aria-live regions, keyboard nav (#6738-#6745) (#6750)

- #6738: Wrap MissionControlDialog in useModalFocusTrap + restore focus on close
- #6739: Stepper gains role=tablist, ArrowLeft/Right nav, aria-selected per tab
- #6740: Chat messages container gets role=log aria-live=polite for streaming AI
- #6741: Mission status indicator gains role=status aria-live=polite
- #6742: MissionSidebar mobile/tablet backdrops get tabIndex=-1 + aria-hidden
- #6743: PayloadCard priority dropdown dismisses on Escape
- #6744: SVG ProjectNode + ClusterZone become keyboard-focusable (tabIndex=0,
  role=button, Enter/Space, focus/blur surface the same hover payload)
- #6745: MissionControlDialog aria-label falls back to 'Mission control dialog'
  when the user-supplied title is empty

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
